reasoning: 1. TP Dist: 1062.1 (2.0x ATR). 2. SL Dist: 955.9 (Base 1.8x ATR). 3. TP/SL Ratio: 1.11. 4. Regime: BEARISH/RANGING. 5. Logic: Price rejected the POC (67694) with a clear double top on the 15m chart, confirming the POC as a supply zone rather than support. The recovery from the Feb 24 lows was corrective (low volume), forming a bear flag. With the trend showing lower highs and the failure to sustain above the High Volume Node, the path of least resistance is a retest of the Value Area Low (VAL) near 64800.
reasoning_zh: 1. 止盈距离：1062.1 (2.0x ATR)。2. 止损距离：955.9 (基准 1.8x ATR)。3. 盈亏比：1.11。4. 市场环境：看跌/震荡 (BEARISH/RANGING)。5. 逻辑：价格在控制点 (POC) 67694 处遭到拒绝，15分钟图显示清晰的双顶结构，确认了 POC 是供应区而非支撑位。从 2月24日低点的反弹是修正性的（低成交量），形成了熊旗。由于趋势显示出较低的高点，且未能维持在高成交量节点上方，阻力最小的路径是重新测试 64800 附近的价值区低点 (VAL)。
